name: BloodLight
short_description: BloodLight is a cooperative first-person horror game for up to 5 players. While working as a night watchman, you will face a demon that constantly changes form. Set out in a team or alone through the chilling environment to complete all the tasks.
detailed_description:
WARNING: This game contains flashing lights, loud sounds, and lots of jumpscares.

Description

BloodLight is a cooperative first-person horror game for up to 5 players. While working as a night watchman, you will face a demon that constantly changes form. Set out in a team or alone through the chilling environment to complete all the quests.

Experience

BloodLight offers many objects to use from vending machines to toilets. Nor will you be deprived of basic human needs such as peeing, fatigue or body temperature. In the game you can also spit, burp, fart but also whistle, squeak or cough. BloodLight is a very realistic game but despite the huge amount of options, the game is made to not be too challenging and to provide the best gaming experience.

Environment

BloodLight takes place in the haunted warehouse of one of Brown's factories. The game features a lot of interactions with objects, and anything you find in the game can be used to make you feel better while playing. Everything in the game is randomly generated and because of this, the game is never the same and can always surprise you. The first map At the same time, the game itself is very random and sometimes confusing. You'll wander through long hallways that take you to places you can't even imagine. Each room in the house will show you its spooky story, which will immediately draw you into the confusing and creepy world of BloodLight. The game takes you through a handful of strange places, only to reveal the truth.

Multiplayer

In addition to the singleplayer mode, BloodLight also features multiplayer for up to 5 players. In some situations, you'll be poset to work together to survive this nightmare.

supported_languages:
English*, French*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Portuguese - Brazil*, Japanese*, Russian*, Turkish*, Ukrainian*, Simplified Chinese*, Czech*
*languages with full audio support
